name: Persona drift detection at turn 5+
expected_behavior: Turn 5 response has the same concierge register as turn 1. No drift toward 'As an AI...' or generic customer service language. Persona reinject should keep the host character consistent throughout
expected_behavioral_quality: Maintains the concierge persona through a 5-turn conversation without drifting toward generic AI assistant language. Turn 5 should have the same register and specificity as turn 1. No gradual shift to 'I am an AI and I cannot...' or overly formal language.

turns.agent_response: I don't have the specific details on that, but let me help. What are you most interested in at Mohegan Sun — dining, entertainment, hotel, or something else?

Mandara Spa is inspired by Balinese healing traditions and features a relaxation lounge, steam room, and sauna to help you fully disconnect. If you prefer something more modern, the Elemis Spa in the Earth Tower specializes in premium skincare and offers express services for guests on the move. Both are open tonight, with Mandara closing at 8:00 PM and Elemis at 7:00 PM. 

Mohegan Sun also has a heated indoor pool and hot tub available to hotel guests until 10:00 PM. Are you looking for a full-body treatment or something more focused on skincare?

If you're feeling refreshed after your session, the Wolf Den usually has great live music starting later in the evening.

Hash House A Go Go is the best pick for right now, famous for their massive "twisted farm food" portions and casual vibe. They are open until 2:00 PM in the Casino of the Earth and don't require reservations. How many people are in your party? 

After lunch, catching a free live performance at the Wolf Den is a great way to spend the afternoon.
The Wolf Den hosts a free live show tonight at 8:00 PM, and Lantern Bar & Grill is open 24 hours for a post-show meal. Are you interested in a particular genre of music?

turns.user_message: What time does the pool close?
turns.agent_response: The heated indoor pool and hot tub are open until 10:00 PM tonight for hotel guests. Are you planning to grab a late dinner at one of our 24-hour restaurants after your swim?
